title: Processing Sketch Scaffold — Alive Imaging (with Citations)
content_html:
Processing Sketch Scaffold — Alive Imaging (with Citations)

Generated: 2025-09-21 16:25:22 BST · Europe/London

Original Prompt

2025-09-21 16:25:22 BST

— “Yes — scaffold a minimal Processing sketch (classes, stub methods, manifest CSV/JSON) matching the aliveness modules.”

What you got

  • /AliveProcessingSketch/ with .pde files: AliveProcessingSketch, PunctumPoint, SourceImage, AgencyEvent, Utils.
  • /AliveProcessingSketch/data/manifest.csv (starter rows) and /data/sources/ folder.
  • Batch-first design (RUN_INTERACTIVE=false). One composite PNG is rendered to /output/.

How to run (Processing)

  1. Open the folder in Processing (Java mode). Ensure the sketch folder name matches AliveProcessingSketch.
  2. Put a few test images in data/sources/ and list them in data/manifest.csv.
  3. Click Run. The app saves an output PNG to output/ and exits.

Extending toward “aliveness”

  1. Punctum: add click-to-mark in interactive mode to populate puncta and turn computeWeights() into a Gaussian field.
  2. Salience: accept a binary face-mask per image; weight opacity locally. (Heuristic/ML optional.)
  3. Aura: tune orderByAura (source-count, allowed blend modes, grain, halation).
  4. Relational: if interactive, map dwell-time/cursor distance to vignette or contrast.
  5. Agency: keep JSONL logs to influence next-run defaults.

Citations

Barthes, R. (1981). Camera Lucida. Link
Benjamin, W. (1936/1969). Work of Art… Link
Berger, J. (1972). Ways of Seeing. Link
Wardle, S. G., et al. (2020). Face pareidolia. Link
Akdeniz, G., et al. (2018). Visual pareidolia mechanisms. Link
Rossion, B. (2024). Anterior fusiform in face recognition. Link
Gell, A. (1998). Art and Agency. Link

This guide accompanies the sketch and adheres to your export conventions.
